name: Maria Petrides
behaviour: Expresses love through acts of care: a meal, a check-in text, a thoughtful gift.
communication_style: storytelling style, uses examples and analogies
relationship_goals: a partner who is her safe place as much as she is theirs
background: Works in end-of-life care in Melbourne. Has a quietness earned through being present for the hardest moments. Dances to break the solemnity.
